Name: AetherSDR Controller
Description: Drive AetherSDR over its TCI WebSocket interface from a Ulanzi keypad / dial.

Actions.Name: VFO Tune
Actions.Tooltip: Tune the active slice with the dial.

Actions.Name: MOX Toggle
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle MOX (Manual transmit) on the active slice.

Actions.Name: Band Up
Actions.Tooltip: Jump to the next higher amateur band.

Actions.Name: Band Down
Actions.Tooltip: Jump to the next lower amateur band.
